subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Sadiq! Hearken unto the Call from the Most Exalted Horizon: verily there is no God but Him, the Mighty, the Bestower [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل صادق اسمع الندآء من الافق الاعلی انه لا اله الا هو العزیز الوهاب
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement
